headline: Digging In on Airline, Data Center, and Fintech News
summary: Just when you think you have a handle on how a company will react to rising oil prices, Delta Air Lines goes and flips the idea on its head.

headline: Why this portfolio manager prefers McDonald's stock over Nvidia
summary: On this segment of Market Madness, NFJ Investment Group managing director and senior portfolio manager Burns McKinney names his preferred stock pick from each matchup: JPMorgan (JPM) vs. Netflix (NFLX), Amazon (AMZN) vs. Delta (DAL), McDonald's (MCD) vs. Nvidia (NVDA), and Nike (NKE) vs. Coinbase (COIN).

headline: British Airways to reward pilots for cutting fuel as airlines tackle higher costs
summary: Jet fuel prices surged about 106% compared to a month ago, according to data from the week ending March 20 via the International Air Transport Association.

headline: TSA Administrator Warn About 'Fluid, Challenging And Unpredictable' Situation: 'May Have To Close Smaller Airports...'
summary: Record-long TSA lines hit U.S. airports as shutdown causes massive staff shortages; travelers face delays, lane closures and missed flights nationwide.

headline: 'Grin and bear it': How investors are navigating the Trump-Iran market whiplash
summary: The U.S. and Iran appeared to diverge on accounts of potential peace deal, with Washington touting progress in diplomatic setup while Tehran denying interest in any bilateral talks.

raw.headline: 'Grin and bear it': How investors are navigating the Trump-Iran market whiplash
